positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a mountain range at dawn. The scene features geometric, layered peaks emerging from a calm body of water. The color palette is restricted to deep indigo, burnt orange, muted gold, and pristine white. The style is modern linocut art mixed with watercolor wash effects, giving it a clean, high-contrast, and symbolic feel. The composition must be perfectly centered, featuring sharp, defined silhouettes against a gradient sky. Ideal for apparel printing: vector-quality details, strong lines, and negative space emphasis. Cinematic, clean, crisp, pop art influence.
negative: blurry, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, poorly drawn, low resolution, bad anatomy, cartoonish, photographic, cinematic photo, grain, sketch
